feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to calculate two YTD fields (both should have different input control on DATE field)
entry.content:
How to calculate two YTD fields (both should have different input control on DATE field as multiple selection Hierarchy) in SAC story with those below conditions.

1. Date Input control: User will provide Date input in Multiple selection Hierarchy.

2. Suppose user give input July,2024 then the YTD field calculation show the summation value from March,2024 to last closing month e.g June,2024.

#sacreporting #sacplanning #ytdcalculation

entry.title: integrate SAP Analytics Cloud into MDK
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I hope you are well.
I am looking for some video/course/documentation that will allow me to implement SAP Analytics Cloud in a MKD application.
At the moment I have created an MDK application, but I don't know about Analytics Cloud and I want to create something to show in the application.
Does anyone know if this is possible? As I understand it is possible, but I did not find any video that shows me how to do it.
Thank you very much!

entry.title: Proper URL for access to SAC from an external platform
entry.content:
Dear all.

I am trying to create a proper URL for access to a SAC report from an external platform, i.e. Sales Force. The  SAC report is based on an Bex query. The Bex query has only one mandatory, input-ready variable GCO_TIME_REF (manual, not Customer Exit), which is based on a characteristics of type Date (0DATE).

The URL is as of the following:

https://xxx.eu1.sapanalytics.cloud/sap/fpa/ui/tenants/011/app.html#/story2&/s2/9FC813066083DC87D2B1D7EEBA7B2DBD/?v01Model=Cev4161j0g62i4beei83f1t183v&v01Par=GCO_TIME_REF&v01Val=20240625&mode=view

Due to data security puposes, I have replaced the first part of the URL, which refers to the tenant, with xxx. 

Somehow the URL doesn't work. When ever i tried to open it, i just landed on the popup windows, where i have to insert the value of the variable GCO_TIME_REF manually. The date "20240625" of the URL is somehow not accepted.

Can someone please tell me why?

Many thanks in advance

BR

entry.title: SAC Table - 3 Dimension Rows are merged to 1 Row automatically without hierarchy?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am experiencing a weird behavior in my Table. All Dimensions that I select on Rows will be merged in 1 Row with a hierarchy (>). But every Dimension has Hierarchy=Flat Presentation. How is this possible? I never seen such a behavior?

entry.title: Connect Analysis for Office (AfO) with SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
entry.content:
Hi community,

I would like to access my models in SAC with AfO. I created a new connection according to this helpful post: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/connecting-sac-to-ao-analysis-office/ba-p/13456407

It worked, but I can only see the two Models you can see in the Screenshot. That is a customer's tenant, on our tenant I can see all models.

How can I access all the other models in the customer's tenant, that I could access in SAC directly? Any ideas?

 

Thanks in advance,

Eric

entry.title: Allocation with movement to layer
entry.content:
Hello, 
I have a dimension for group of CCs, and a dimension for CC.
I want to take a value that is in Group CC (CC#) and using a driver of claims volume allocate the value to CC.

it works.

However, I also have an "allocation layer" dimension (kind of audit trail) and I want to move the result to a new layer in the allocation step. that's where I fail.

that's what I want:

 

that's what I do:

 

what do I miss?

 

thank you!

Deb

entry.title: Is it possible to switch the display of a dimension in a chart from ID to description using script?
entry.content: Is it possible to switch the display of a dimension in a chart from ID to description, or to show both ID and description, using scripting in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) using buttons?

entry.title: Assistance Required for Comparing same Column Values in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,


We are currently facing a challenge in comparing values within the same column in SAP Analytical Applications and model scripting in SAP Analytics Cloud. Specifically, we have a dataset with a column called "Vehicle Speed". Our requirement is to compare each value in this column with the subsequent value (i.e., the 1st value with the 2nd, the 2nd with the 3rd, and so on). Whenever a specified condition is met during these comparisons, we need to create an additional measure column to capture these instances as '1' or '0'.

Despite our efforts to implement this in SAC Analytical Applications and Model Scripting, we have not been successful.

Please find below image for data.

As the highlighted data increments from 0 to 20, we need to track instances where the next record is greater than or equal to 20. For this, we require an additional measure column to count such instances.


Kindly help me with above requirement.

Thanks,
Urvish

entry.title: SAC - Number Format
entry.content:
Hello,

is it possible to dispaly numbers like 40'000 instead of 40,000 ?

 

Kr

entry.title: Access to Performance Analysis tool in SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to provide a user access to the performance analysis tool in SAC without giving the user Admin/BI Admin privileges?. Please suggest.

I have access to the tool but I am not Admin and want to grant another user access to the Perf Analysis tool.

 

 

Cheers,

entry.title: How to Expand/Collapse All Dimension Members Simultaneously in BW 7.5 Live Data Table?
entry.content: I am working with BW 7.5 live data and have a table with three dimensions and one measure. The dimensions are structured without hierarchy, so I can expand or collapse each member individually. Is there a way to expand or collapse all dimension members at once using script buttons?

entry.title: Availability of "Restricted Dimension" in HANA
entry.content: I am using BW 7.5 live data and cannot find the "restricted dimension" option in the designer. I understand this feature is not available with live data. We are moving to HANA next month. Will "restricted dimension" be available in HANA?

entry.title: Showing Partial Dimension Members in SAC Chart Using Scripting
entry.content: In SAC charts, is it possible to show partial dimension members using scripting? Specifically, I want to display characters from the 5th to the 12th character.

entry.title: Hiding Story Filters or Excluding Dimension Members via Scripting in SAC
entry.content: In SAC, I want to exclude two dimension members from a table. I created a story filter to exclude these members. Is there a way to hide this story filter using scripting? Alternatively, can I directly exclude these members using scripting?

entry.title: SAC implementation
entry.content:
Hi,

Once we get the SAC tenant from SAP, what steps to be taken for configuring SAC

We will be going with creating Direct Live connection to S4HANA

Thanks,

entry.title: Access Columns in SAC
entry.content:
Hi!

How do I ensure that a person has access to the stories in SAC, can import files with data, but in the model does not have access to the read and write column (can't change anything)? That is, they cannot change what is in these columns.

entry.title: SAC Advanced Formula - Copy month value to all months of specific year
entry.content:
Hello,

the requirement is rather simple, but i am not yet very experience in advanced formulas.

I want to select a month of a specific year (defined as dynamic parameter) and then select a year (or year as the node of a date hierarchy). 

Then this monthly value should be copied to every month of the selected year. 

How is this possible with advanced formula?

Thank you!

entry.title: SAC Data Action - Allocation based on multiple dimensions
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

I have a requirement to allocate the budget data against Costcentre and G/L account. Driver being the previous year Actuals.

I have the data to be allocated saved in a Datasource (Highlevel phasing) against a default costcentre for multiple G/L accounts. This data is copied from another model.

I saved the yearly Actuals under the same version. Actuals will be having the costcentres that doesnot have the default costcentre.

Allocation of budget data should happen from the default costcentre to the other costcentres against corresponding G/L accounts. Allocation driver being Average amount of costcentre for past 2 or 3 years.

Sample data is like below

I couldn't try Allocate step as my planning model has Account as generic.

I tried the advanced formula like below with nested ForEach (one for Costcentre and another for Account), but it takes very long (around 20 minutes ) to execute and fail. Code other than the declaration is as below(Only for previous year).

Can I please get help to understand if I am doing anything wrong or if there is a better way to handle this.

Any help would be much appreciated. @N1kh1l Thanks.

entry.title: Date not grouped in story with Datasphere model
entry.content:
Hello SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere experts.

I have made an analytics model following this flow:

Replication Flow > Table > SQL View > Analytic Model

Within that process, I have a table that stores a field (ERDAT) as String since that is how I get it from the SAP table. In the SQL View I transform it into a date with the to_date() function. And this is done correctly, however, when I go to view it in the SAP Analytics Cloud history and I want to, for example, set a filter, they do not appear grouped as when I create the model directly in SAP Analytics Cloud:

 

but by individual dates:

I don't know how I can change this setting in SAP Datasphere. Or if it is something to change in SAP Analytics Cloud.

Best regards

entry.title: Dividing different units in advanced formula
entry.content:
Hallo,

i try to divide two measures. One is currency EUR and the other one Unit FTE.

This is just a stripped down version of my script to show the problem.

I have implemented to version to calculate the @average - line 9 and line 17

when i uncomment line 17 i get the correct result of 30(see screenshot)

in the commented version(this is my prefered one) i get 0.

It seems to have something to do with units because when i store the results in separate variables i get the expected result.

The FLOAT()s i added to the calculation in line 9 but with no effect.

Thanks for any ideas

MEMBERSET [d/Account] = ("Opex - Salaries & Wages", "FHeads_FJEmps")
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = "202411" TO "202412"
MEMBERSET [d/PD_Business_Area] = ("CSO")
MEMBERSET [d/PD_Cost_Center] = ("1000/#")
FLOAT @averagefte
FLOAT @averagesal
FLOAT @average

@average =
FLOAT(
	   	FLOAT(RESULTLOOKUP([d/Account] = "Opex - Salaries & Wages", [d/Date] = "202411")) /
		FLOAT(RESULTLOOKUP([d/Account] = "FHeads_FJEmps", [d/Date] = "202411"))
	  )

@averagesal = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Account] = "Opex - Salaries & Wages", [d/Date] = "202411")
@averagefte = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Account] = "FHeads_FJEmps", [d/Date] = "202411")
//@average = @averagesal / @averagefte

DATA([d/Account] = "Opex - Salaries & Wages", [d/Date] = "202412", [d/PD_Business_Area] = "CSO") = ((RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = "202411", [d/Account] = "Opex - Salaries & Wages", [d/PD_Business_Area] = "CSO")) * 0) + @average
